headline: HPE Expands AI Networking As Juniper Integration Tests Long Term Growth Story
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise announced a major expansion of its AI native networking and compute solutions ahead of Mobile World Congress 2026. The update highlights deeper integration of Juniper Networks technology across HPE's portfolio. New offerings are aimed at service providers and enterprise customers looking to modernize AI infrastructure and managed network services. The announcement marks a key milestone in the operational integration of the Juniper acquisition for...

headline: Is Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Attractively Priced After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) still offers value at its current share price, this breakdown is designed to help you make sense of where it stands today. HPE recently closed at US$21.13, with a 7 day return of a 1.6% decline, a 30 day return of a 10.5% decline, a year to date return of a 12.6% decline, but a 1 year return of 37.2% and a 3 year return of 60.4% that sits above its 5 year return of 53.7%. Recent headlines around HPE have centred on its role in...
